meaning: n.[动]鼻涕虫,懒汉,子弹,金属小块vi.偷懒,捕鼻涕虫vt.插嵌片于
examples: Inside the slug, about 1 percent of the amoebas turn into police.

That will happen naturally as the newcomers slug it out with big-bucks ad campaigns.
